name: collective
description: The Collective operator safety floor for Claude Code: a catastrophic-command denylist (recursive root deletion, DROP DATABASE, fork bombs, force-push to protected branches, etc.) plus a protected-file guard, bundled with the c-* workflow skills. Every hook runs locally with ZERO network egress and reads no credentials — a PreToolUse check on Bash commands, an Edit/Write guard on platform-safety files, a UserPromptSubmit claim-gate contract, and a PostToolUse check that, only inside a Collective-governed repo, reads the new commit SHA after a git commit and asks the agent to record it via the collective MCP server. This plugin never calls home on its own: every server call is made by the agent over your own authenticated MCP session. Also ships the delivery-methodology skills (c-change-note, c-client-comms) with a UserPromptSubmit trigger that names the right skill when a scope-change or client-communication moment is detected — local pattern matching only, no network.
